description: File a new complaint in ArkCase. Log in as arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com (password: ArkCase1234!). Set the Complaint Title to 'Failure to respond to FOIA request #2023-EPA-00145 within statutory 20-day deadline', the Incident Category to 'Government', and the Priority to 'High'. For the complaint description, enter: 'The agency failed to acknowledge receipt of our FOIA request dated March 15, 2023, and has not provided a response within the required 20 business days. Request concerned emissions data from industrial facilities in Houston, TX. Requester: Maria Gonzalez, mgonzalez@epa-watchdog.org.'
